rationale: Educ. Code §12.123 governs training requirements for open-enrollment charter school governing body members and officers. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
quote:
The commissioner shall adopt rules prescribing training for:
(1) members of governing bodies of open-enrollment charter schools; and
(2) officers of open-enrollment charter schools.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this charter school training statute.
